1366 static
1367 int check_config_file (oci_container *def, libcrun_error_t *err)
1368 {
1369   if (UNLIKELY (def->root == NULL))
1370     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "invalid config file, no 'root' block specified");
1371   if (UNLIKELY (def->linux == NULL))
1372     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "invalid config file, no 'linux' block specified");
1373   if (UNLIKELY (def->mounts == NULL))
1374     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "invalid config file, no 'mounts' block specified");
1375   return 0;
1376 }
1377 
1378 static
1379 int libcrun_copy_config_file (const char *id, const char *state_root, const char *bundle, libcrun_error_t *err)
1380 {
1381   int ret;
1382   cleanup_free char *src_path = NULL;
1383   cleanup_free char *dest_path = NULL;
1384   cleanup_free char *dir = NULL;
1385   cleanup_free char *buffer = NULL;
1386   size_t len;
1387 
1388   dir = libcrun_get_state_directory (state_root, id);
1389   if (UNLIKELY (dir == NULL))
1390         return crun_make_error (err, 0, "cannot get state directory");
1391 
1392   xasprintf (&src_path, "%s/config.json", bundle);
1393   xasprintf (&dest_path, "%s/config.json", dir);
1394 
1395   ret = read_all_file (src_path, &buffer, &len, err);
1396   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1397     return ret;
1398 
1399   ret = write_file (dest_path, buffer, len, err);
1400   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1401     return ret;
1402 
1403   return 0;
1404 }
1405 
1406 int
1407 libcrun_container_run (libcrun_context_t *context, libcrun_container_t *container, unsigned int options, libcrun_error_t *err)
1408 {
1409   oci_container *def = container->container_def;
1410   int ret;
1411   int detach = context->detach;
1412   int container_ret_status[2];
1413   cleanup_close int pipefd0 = -1;
1414   cleanup_close int pipefd1 = -1;
1415 
1416   container->context = context;
1417 
1418   ret = check_config_file (def, err);
1419   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1420     return ret;
1421 
1422   if (def->oci_version && strstr (def->oci_version, "1.0") == NULL)
1423     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "unknown version specified");
1424 
1425   ret = libcrun_status_check_directories (context->state_root, context->id, err);
1426   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1427     return ret;
1428 
1429   ret = libcrun_copy_config_file (context->id, context->state_root, context->bundle, err);
1430   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1431     return ret;
1432 
1433   if (def->process && def->process->terminal && detach && context->console_socket == NULL)
1434     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "use --console-socket with --detach when a terminal is used");
1435 
1436   if (!detach && (options & LIBCRUN_RUN_OPTIONS_PREFORK) == 0)
1437     return libcrun_container_run_internal (container, context, -1, err);
1438 
1439   ret = pipe (container_ret_status);
1440   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1441     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "pipe");
1442   pipefd0 = container_ret_status[0];
1443   pipefd1 = container_ret_status[1];
1444 
1445   ret = fork ();
1446   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1447     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "fork");
1448   if (ret)
1449     {
1450       int status;
1451       close_and_reset (&pipefd1);
1452       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (waitpid (ret, &status, 0));
1453 
1454       ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (pipefd0, &status, sizeof (status)));
1455       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1456         return ret;
1457 
1458       if (status < 0)
1459         {
1460           int errno_;
1461           char buf[512];
1462           ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (pipefd0, &errno_, sizeof (errno_)));
1463           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1464             return ret;
1465 
1466           ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (pipefd0, buf, sizeof (buf) - 1));
1467           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1468             return ret;
1469           buf[ret] = '\0';
1470 
1471           return crun_make_error (err, errno_, buf);
1472         }
1473 
1474       return status;
1475     }
1476 
1477   close_and_reset (&pipefd0);
1478 
1479   /* forked process.  */
1480   ret = detach_process ();
1481   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1482     libcrun_fail_with_error (errno, "detach process");
1483   ret = libcrun_container_run_internal (container, context, -1, err);
1484   TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (pipefd1, &ret, sizeof (ret)));
1485   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1486     {
1487       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (pipefd1, &((*err)->status), sizeof ((*err)->status)));
1488       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (pipefd1, (*err)->msg, strlen ((*err)->msg) + 1));
1489 
1490       crun_set_output_handler (log_write_to_stderr, NULL);
1491       libcrun_fail_with_error ((*err)->status, "%s", (*err)->msg);
1492     }
1493   exit (ret);
1494 }
1495 
1496 int
1497 libcrun_container_create (libcrun_context_t *context, libcrun_container_t *container, libcrun_error_t *err)
1498 {
1499   oci_container *def = container->container_def;
1500   int ret;
1501   int container_ready_pipe[2];
1502   cleanup_close int pipefd0 = -1;
1503   cleanup_close int pipefd1 = -1;
1504   cleanup_close int exec_fifo_fd = -1;
1505   context->detach = 1;
1506 
1507   container->context = context;
1508 
1509   if (def->oci_version && strstr (def->oci_version, "1.0") == NULL)
1510     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "unknown version specified");
1511 
1512   ret = check_config_file (def, err);
1513   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1514     return ret;
1515 
1516   ret = libcrun_status_check_directories (context->state_root, context->id, err);
1517   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1518     return ret;
1519 
1520   ret = libcrun_copy_config_file (context->id, context->state_root, ".", err);
1521   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1522     return ret;
1523 
1524   if (def->process && def->process->terminal && context->console_socket == NULL)
1525     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "use --console-socket with create when a terminal is used");
1526 
1527   exec_fifo_fd = libcrun_status_create_exec_fifo (context->state_root, context->id, err);
1528   if (UNLIKELY (exec_fifo_fd < 0))
1529     return exec_fifo_fd;
1530 
1531   ret = pipe (container_ready_pipe);
1532   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1533     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "pipe");
1534   pipefd0 = container_ready_pipe[0];
1535   pipefd1 = container_ready_pipe[1];
1536 
1537   ret = fork ();
1538   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1539     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "fork");
1540   if (ret)
1541     {
1542       int exit_code;
1543       close_and_reset (&pipefd1);
1544 
1545       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (waitpid (ret, NULL, 0));
1546 
1547       ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (pipefd0, &exit_code, sizeof (exit_code)));
1548       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1549         return crun_make_error (err, errno, "waiting for container to be ready");
1550       if (ret > 0)
1551         {
1552           if (exit_code != 0)
1553             {
1554               libcrun_error_t tmp_err;
1555               libcrun_container_delete (context, def, context->id, true, &tmp_err);
1556               crun_error_release (err);
1557             }
1558           return -exit_code;
1559         }
1560       return 1;
1561     }
1562 
1563   context->fifo_exec_wait_fd = exec_fifo_fd;
1564   exec_fifo_fd = -1;
1565 
1566   /* forked process.  */
1567   ret = detach_process ();
1568   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1569     libcrun_fail_with_error (errno, "detach process");
1570 
1571   ret = libcrun_container_run_internal (container, context, pipefd1, err);
1572   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1573     {
1574       libcrun_error ((*err)->status, true, "%s", (*err)->msg);
1575       crun_set_output_handler (log_write_to_stderr, NULL);
1576     }
1577 
1578   TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (pipefd1, &ret, sizeof (ret)));
1579   exit (ret);
1580 }
1581 
1582 int
1583 libcrun_container_start (libcrun_context_t *context, const char *id, libcrun_error_t *err)
1584 {
1585   int ret;
1586   cleanup_close int fd = -1;
1587   const char *state_root = context->state_root;
1588   libcrun_container_status_t status;
1589 
1590   memset (&status, 0, sizeof (status));
1591   ret = libcrun_read_container_status (&status, state_root, id, err);
1592   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1593     return ret;
1594 
1595   ret = libcrun_is_container_running (&status, err);
1596   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1597     return ret;
1598 
1599   if (!ret)
1600     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "container '%s' is not running", id);
1601 
1602   if (context->notify_socket)
1603     {
1604       ret = get_notify_fd (context, NULL, &fd, err);
1605       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1606         return ret;
1607     }
1608 
1609   ret = libcrun_status_write_exec_fifo (context->state_root, id, err);
1610   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1611     return ret;
1612 
1613   if (context->notify_socket)
1614     {
1615       if (fd >= 0)
1616         {
1617           fd_set read_set;
1618 
1619           while (1)
1620             {
1621               struct timeval timeout = {
1622                                         .tv_sec = 0,
1623                                         .tv_usec = 10000,
1624               };
1625               FD_ZERO (&read_set);
1626               FD_SET (fd, &read_set);
1627 
1628               ret = select (fd + 1, &read_set, NULL, NULL, &timeout);
1629               if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1630                 return ret;
1631               if (ret)
1632                 {
1633                   ret = handle_notify_socket (fd, err);
1634                   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1635                     return ret;
1636                   if (ret)
1637                     break;
1638                 }
1639               else
1640                 {
1641                   ret = libcrun_is_container_running (&status, err);
1642                   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1643                     return ret;
1644                   if (!ret)
1645                     return 0;
1646                 }
1647             }
1648         }
1649     }
1650 
1651   return 0;
1652 }
1653 
1654 int
1655 libcrun_get_container_state_string (const char *id, libcrun_container_status_t *status, const char *state_root, const char **container_status, int *running, libcrun_error_t *err)
1656 {
1657   int ret, has_fifo = 0;
1658 
1659   ret = libcrun_is_container_running (status, err);
1660   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1661     return ret;
1662   *running = ret;
1663 
1664   if (*running)
1665     {
1666       ret = libcrun_status_has_read_exec_fifo (state_root, id, err);
1667       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1668         return ret;
1669       has_fifo = ret;
1670     }
1671 
1672   if (! *running)
1673     *container_status = "stopped";
1674   else if (has_fifo)
1675     *container_status = "created";
1676   else
1677     *container_status = "running";
1678 
1679   return 0;
1680 }
1681 
1682 int
1683 libcrun_container_state (libcrun_context_t *context, const char *id, FILE *out, libcrun_error_t *err)
1684 {
1685   libcrun_container_status_t status;
1686   const char *state_root = context->state_root;
1687   const char *container_status = NULL;
1688   yajl_gen gen = NULL;
1689   const unsigned char *buf;
1690   int ret = 0;
1691   int running;
1692   size_t len;
1693 
1694   memset (&status, 0, sizeof (status));
1695   ret = libcrun_read_container_status (&status, state_root, id, err);
1696   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1697     return ret;
1698 
1699   ret = libcrun_get_container_state_string (id, &status, state_root, &container_status, &running, err);
1700   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1701     goto exit;
1702 
1703   ret = 0;
1704   gen = yajl_gen_alloc (NULL);
1705   if (gen == NULL)
1706     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "yajl_gen_alloc failed");
1707 
1708   yajl_gen_config (gen, yajl_gen_beautify, 1);
1709   yajl_gen_config (gen, yajl_gen_validate_utf8, 1);
1710 
1711   yajl_gen_map_open (gen);
1712   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("ociVersion"), strlen ("ociVersion"));
1713   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("1.0.0"), strlen ("1.0.0"));
1714 
1715   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("id"), strlen ("id"));
1716   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (id), strlen (id));
1717 
1718   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("pid"), strlen ("pid"));
1719   yajl_gen_integer (gen, running ? status.pid : 0);
1720 
1721   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("status"), strlen ("status"));
1722   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (container_status), strlen (container_status));
1723 
1724   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("bundle"), strlen ("bundle"));
1725   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (status.bundle), strlen (status.bundle));
1726 
1727   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("rootfs"), strlen ("rootfs"));
1728   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (status.rootfs), strlen (status.rootfs));
1729 
1730   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("created"), strlen ("created"));
1731   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (status.created), strlen (status.created));
1732 
1733   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("owner"), strlen ("owner"));
1734   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (""), strlen (""));
1735 
1736   {
1737     size_t i;
1738     cleanup_free char *config_file;
1739     cleanup_free libcrun_container_t *container = NULL;
1740     cleanup_free char *dir = NULL;
1741 
1742     dir = libcrun_get_state_directory (state_root, id);
1743     if (UNLIKELY (dir == NULL))
1744       return crun_make_error (err, 0, "cannot get state directory");
1745 
1746     xasprintf (&config_file, "%s/config.json", dir);
1747     container = libcrun_container_load_from_file (config_file, err);
1748     if (UNLIKELY (container == NULL))
1749       return crun_make_error (err, 0, "error loading config.json");
1750 
1751     if (container->container_def->annotations && container->container_def->annotations->len)
1752       {
1753         yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("annotations"), strlen ("annotations"));
1754         yajl_gen_map_open (gen);
1755         for (i = 0; i < container->container_def->annotations->len; i++)
1756           {
1757             const char *key = container->container_def->annotations->keys[i];
1758             const char *val = container->container_def->annotations->values[i];
1759             yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (key), strlen (key));
1760             yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (val), strlen (val));
1761           }
1762         yajl_gen_map_close (gen);
1763       }
1764    free_oci_container (container->container_def);
1765   }
1766 
1767   yajl_gen_map_close (gen);
1768 
1769   yajl_gen_get_buf (gen, &buf, &len);
1770 
1771   fprintf (out, "%s\n", buf);
1772 
1773  exit:
1774   if (gen)
1775     yajl_gen_free (gen);
1776   libcrun_free_container_status (&status);
1777   return ret;
1778 }
1779 
1780 int
1781 libcrun_container_exec (libcrun_context_t *context, const char *id, oci_container_process *process, libcrun_error_t *err)
1782 {
1783   int ret;
1784   pid_t pid;
1785   libcrun_container_status_t status;
1786   const char *state_root = context->state_root;
1787   cleanup_close int terminal_fd = -1;
1788   cleanup_close int seccomp_fd = -1;
1789   cleanup_terminal void *orig_terminal = NULL;
1790   cleanup_free char *config_file = NULL;
1791   cleanup_free libcrun_container_t *container = NULL;
1792   cleanup_free char *dir = NULL;
1793 
1794   memset (&status, 0, sizeof (status));
1795   ret = libcrun_read_container_status (&status, state_root, id, err);
1796   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1797     return ret;
1798 
1799   ret = libcrun_is_container_running (&status, err);
1800   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1801     return ret;
1802 
1803   dir = libcrun_get_state_directory (state_root, id);
1804   if (UNLIKELY (dir == NULL))
1805     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "cannot get state directory");
1806 
1807   xasprintf (&config_file, "%s/config.json", dir);
1808   container = libcrun_container_load_from_file (config_file, err);
1809   if (container == NULL)
1810     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "error loading config.json");
1811 
1812   if (ret == 0)
1813     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "the container '%s' is not running.", id);
1814 
1815   if (!context->detach)
1816     {
1817       ret = block_signals (err);
1818       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1819         return ret;
1820     }
1821 
1822   ret = block_signals (err);
1823   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1824     return ret;
1825 
1826   ret = open_seccomp_output (context->id, &seccomp_fd, true, context->state_root, err);
1827   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1828     return ret;
1829 
1830   /* This must be done before we enter a user namespace.  */
1831   ret = libcrun_set_rlimits (process->rlimits, process->rlimits_len, err);
1832   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1833     return ret;
1834 
1835   pid = libcrun_join_process (container, status.pid, &status, context->detach, process->terminal ? &terminal_fd : NULL, err);
1836   if (UNLIKELY (pid < 0))
1837     return pid;
1838 
1839   /* Process to exec.  */
1840   if (pid == 0)
1841     {
1842       int i;
1843       uid_t container_uid = process->user ? process->user->uid : 0;
1844       gid_t container_gid = process->user ? process->user->gid : 0;
1845       const char *cwd;
1846       oci_container_process_capabilities *capabilities = NULL;
1847 
1848       cwd = process->cwd ? process->cwd : "/";
1849       if (chdir (cwd) < 0)
1850         libcrun_fail_with_error (errno, "chdir");
1851 
1852       ret = unblock_signals (err);
1853       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1854         return ret;
1855 
1856       for (i = 0; i < process->env_len; i++)
1857         if (putenv (process->env[i]) < 0)
1858           libcrun_fail_with_error ( errno, "putenv '%s'", process->env[i]);
1859 
1860       if (process->selinux_label)
1861         {
1862           if (UNLIKELY (set_selinux_exec_label (process->selinux_label, err) < 0))
1863             libcrun_fail_with_error ((*err)->status, "%s", (*err)->msg);
1864         }
1865 
1866       if (!process->no_new_privileges)
1867         {
1868           ret = libcrun_apply_seccomp (seccomp_fd, err);
1869           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1870             return ret;
1871         }
1872 
1873       if (process->user && process->user->additional_gids_len)
1874         {
1875           gid_t *additional_gids = process->user->additional_gids;
1876           size_t additional_gids_len = process->user->additional_gids_len;
1877           ret = setgroups (additional_gids_len, additional_gids);
1878           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1879             libcrun_fail_with_error (errno, "%s", "setgroups %d groups", process->user->additional_gids_len);
1880         }
1881 
1882       if (process->capabilities)
1883         capabilities = process->capabilities;
1884       else if (container->container_def->process)
1885         capabilities = container->container_def->process->capabilities;
1886 
1887       if (capabilities)
1888         {
1889           ret = libcrun_set_caps (capabilities, container_uid, container_gid, process->no_new_privileges, err);
1890           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1891             libcrun_fail_with_error ((*err)->status, "%s", (*err)->msg);
1892         }
1893 
1894       ret = close_fds_ge_than (context->preserve_fds + 3, err);
1895       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1896         libcrun_fail_with_error ((*err)->status, "%s", (*err)->msg);
1897 
1898       if (process->no_new_privileges)
1899         {
1900           ret = libcrun_apply_seccomp (seccomp_fd, err);
1901           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1902             return ret;
1903         }
1904 
1905       execvp (process->args[0], process->args);
1906       if (errno == ENOENT)
1907         libcrun_fail_with_error (errno, "executable file not found in $PATH");
1908       libcrun_fail_with_error (errno, "exec");
1909       _exit (EXIT_FAILURE);
1910     }
1911 
1912   if (seccomp_fd >= 0)
1913     close_and_reset (&seccomp_fd);
1914 
1915   if (terminal_fd >= 0)
1916     {
1917       unsigned short rows = 0, cols = 0;
1918 
1919       if (process->console_size)
1920         {
1921           cols = process->console_size->width;
1922           rows = process->console_size->height;
1923         }
1924 
1925       ret = libcrun_terminal_setup_size (terminal_fd, rows, cols, err);
1926       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1927         return ret;
1928 
1929       if (context->console_socket)
1930         {
1931           int ret;
1932           cleanup_close int console_socket_fd = open_unix_domain_client_socket (context->console_socket, 0, err);

259 #define SYNC_SOCKET_MESSAGE_LEN(x, l) (offsetof (struct sync_socket_message_s, message) + l)

261 static int
262 sync_socket_write_msg (int fd, bool warning, int err_value, const char *log_msg)
263 {
264   int ret;
265   size_t err_len;
266   struct sync_socket_message_s msg;
267   msg.type = warning ? SYNC_SOCKET_WARNING_MESSAGE : SYNC_SOCKET_ERROR_MESSAGE;
268   msg.error_value = err_value;
269 
270   if (fd < 0)
271     return 0;
272 
273   err_len = strlen (log_msg);
274   if (err_len >= sizeof (msg.message))
275     err_len = sizeof (msg.message) - 1;
276 
277   memcpy (msg.message, log_msg, err_len);
278   msg.message[err_len] = '\0';
279 
280   ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (fd, &msg, SYNC_SOCKET_MESSAGE_LEN (msg, err_len + 1)));
281   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
282     return -1;
283 
284   return 0;
285 }
286 
287 static int
288 sync_socket_write_error (int fd, libcrun_error_t *out_err)
289 {
290   if (fd < 0)
291     return 0;
292   return sync_socket_write_msg (fd, false, (*out_err)->status, (*out_err)->msg);
293 }

308 static int
309 sync_socket_wait_sync (libcrun_context_t *context, int fd, bool flush, libcrun_error_t *err)
310 {
311   struct sync_socket_message_s msg;
312 
313   if (fd < 0)
314     return 0;
315 
316   while (true)
317     {
318       int ret;
319 
320       ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (fd, &msg, sizeof (msg)));
321       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
322         {
323           if (flush)
324             return 0;
325           return crun_make_error (err, errno, "read from sync socket");
326         }
327 
328       if (ret == 0)
329         {
330           if (flush)
331             return 0;
332           return crun_make_error (err, 0, "sync socket closed");
333         }
334 
335       if (!flush && msg.type == SYNC_SOCKET_SYNC_MESSAGE)
336         return 0;
337 
338       if (msg.type == SYNC_SOCKET_WARNING_MESSAGE)
339         {
340           if (context)
341             context->output_handler (msg.error_value, msg.message, 1, context->output_handler_arg);
342           continue;
343         }
344       if (msg.type == SYNC_SOCKET_ERROR_MESSAGE)
345         return crun_make_error (err, msg.error_value, "%s", msg.message);
346     }
347 }
348 
349 static int
350 sync_socket_send_sync (int fd, bool flush_errors, libcrun_error_t *err)
351 {
352   int ret;
353   struct sync_socket_message_s msg = {0, };
354   msg.type = SYNC_SOCKET_SYNC_MESSAGE;
355 
356   if (fd < 0)
357     return 0;
358 
359   ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (fd, &msg, SYNC_SOCKET_MESSAGE_LEN (msg, 0)));
360   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
361     {
362       if (flush_errors)
363         {
364           ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (fd, &msg, sizeof (msg)));
365           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
366             goto original_error;
367           if (msg.type == SYNC_SOCKET_ERROR_MESSAGE)
368             return crun_make_error (err, msg.error_value, "%s", msg.message);
369         }
370     original_error:
371       return crun_make_error (err, errno, "write to sync socket");
372     }
373 
374   return 0;
375 }

553 
554   if (def->process && def->process->cwd)
555     if (UNLIKELY (chdir (def->process->cwd) < 0))
556       return crun_make_error (err, errno, "chdir");
557 
558   if (clearenv ())
559     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "clearenv");
560 
561   if (def->process)
562     {
563       size_t i;
564 
565       for (i = 0; i < def->process->env_len; i++)
566         if (putenv (def->process->env[i]) < 0)
567           return crun_make_error (err, errno, "putenv '%s'", def->process->env[i]);
568     }
569   if (notify_socket)
570     {
571       char *notify_socket_env;
572       xasprintf (&notify_socket_env, "NOTIFY_SOCKET=%s", notify_socket);
573       if (putenv (notify_socket_env) < 0)
574         return crun_make_error (err, errno, "putenv '%s'", notify_socket_env);
575     }
576 
577   return 0;
578 }
579 
580 /* Entrypoint to the container.  */
581 static int
582 container_entrypoint (void *args, const char *notify_socket,
583                       int sync_socket, libcrun_error_t *err)
584 {
585   struct container_entrypoint_s *entrypoint_args = args;
586   int ret;
587   oci_container *def = entrypoint_args->container->container_def;
588   entrypoint_args->sync_socket = sync_socket;
589 
590   crun_set_output_handler (log_write_to_sync_socket, args);
591 
592   ret = container_entrypoint_init (args, notify_socket, sync_socket, err);
593   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
594     {
595       /* If it fails to write the error using the sync socket, then fallback
596          to stderr.  */
597       if (sync_socket_write_error (sync_socket, err) < 0)
598         return ret;
599 
600       crun_error_release (err);
601       return ret;
602     }
603 
604   entrypoint_args->sync_socket = -1;
605 
606   ret = unblock_signals (err);
607   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
608     return ret;
609 
610   ret = sync_socket_send_sync (sync_socket, false, err);
611   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
612     return ret;
613 
614   if (entrypoint_args->context->fifo_exec_wait_fd >= 0)
615     {
616       char buffer[1];
617       fd_set read_set;
618       cleanup_close int fd = entrypoint_args->context->fifo_exec_wait_fd;
619       entrypoint_args->context->fifo_exec_wait_fd = -1;
620 
621       FD_ZERO (&read_set);
622       FD_SET (fd, &read_set);
623       do
624         {
625           ret = select (fd + 1, &read_set, NULL, NULL, NULL);
626           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
627             return crun_make_error (err, errno, "select");
628 
629           ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (fd, buffer, sizeof (buffer)));
630           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
631             return crun_make_error (err, errno, "read from the exec fifo");
632         }
633       while (ret == 0);
634     }
635 
636   crun_set_output_handler (log_write_to_stream, stderr);
637 
638   ret = close_fds_ge_than (entrypoint_args->context->preserve_fds + 3, err);
639   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
640     crun_error_write_warning_and_release (entrypoint_args->context->output_handler_arg, &err);
641 
642   if (def->process && def->process->no_new_privileges)
643     {
644       ret = libcrun_generate_and_load_seccomp (entrypoint_args->container, entrypoint_args->seccomp_fd, err);
645       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
646         return ret;
647     }
648 
649   if (! def->process)
650     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "block 'process' not found");
651 
652   execvp (def->process->args[0], def->process->args);
653   if (errno == ENOENT)
654     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "executable file not found in $PATH");
655 
656   return crun_make_error (err, errno, "exec the container process");
657 }

659 struct hook_s
660 {
661     char *path;
662     char **args;
663     size_t args_len;
664 
665     int timeout;
666     char **env;
667     size_t env_len;
668 
669 };

671 static int
672 do_hooks (oci_container *def, pid_t pid, const char *id, bool keep_going, const char *rootfs,
673           const char *cwd, const char *status, struct hook_s **hooks, size_t hooks_len,
674           libcrun_error_t *err)
675 {
676   size_t i, stdin_len;
677   int ret;
678   cleanup_free char *stdin = NULL;
679   const unsigned char *annotations = (const unsigned char *) "{}";
680   cleanup_free char *cwd_allocated = NULL;
681   yajl_gen gen = NULL;
682 
683   if (cwd == NULL)
684     {
685       cwd = cwd_allocated = get_current_dir_name ();
686       if (cwd == NULL)
687         OOM ();
688     }
689 
690   if (def && def->annotations && def->annotations->len)
691     {
692       size_t len;
693 
694       gen = yajl_gen_alloc (NULL);
695       if (gen == NULL)
696         return crun_make_error (err, 0, "yajl_gen_alloc failed");
697 
698       yajl_gen_map_open (gen);
699       for (i = 0; i < def->annotations->len; i++)
700         {
701           const char *key = def->annotations->keys[i];
702           const char *val = def->annotations->values[i];
703 
704           yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (key), strlen (key));
705           yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (val), strlen (val));
706         }
707       yajl_gen_map_close (gen);
708 
709       yajl_gen_get_buf (gen, &annotations, &len);
710     }
711 
712   stdin_len = xasprintf (&stdin, "{\"ociVersion\":\"1.0\", \"id\":\"%s\", \"pid\":%i, \"root\":\"%s\", \"bundle\":\"%s\", \"status\":\"%s\", \"annotations\":%s}", id, pid, rootfs, cwd, status, annotations);
713 
714   for (i = 0; i < hooks_len; i++)
715     {
716       ret = run_process_with_stdin_timeout_envp (hooks[i]->path, hooks[i]->args, cwd, hooks[i]->timeout, hooks[i]->env, stdin, stdin_len, err);
717       if (!keep_going && UNLIKELY (ret != 0))
718           goto exit;
719     }
720 
721   ret = 0;
722 
723  exit:
724   if (gen)
725     yajl_gen_free (gen);
726 
727   return ret;
728 }

730 static int
731 run_poststop_hooks (libcrun_context_t *context, oci_container *def,
732                     libcrun_container_status_t *status,
733                     const char *state_root, const char *id, libcrun_error_t *err)
734 {
735   cleanup_free libcrun_container_t *container = NULL;
736   if (def == NULL)
737     {
738       cleanup_free char *dir = NULL;
739       cleanup_free char *config_file = NULL;
740 
741       dir = libcrun_get_state_directory (state_root, id);
742       if (UNLIKELY (dir == NULL))
743         return crun_make_error (err, 0, "cannot get state directory");
744 
745       xasprintf (&config_file, "%s/config.json", dir);
746       container = libcrun_container_load_from_file (config_file, err);
747       if (container == NULL)
748         return crun_make_error (err, 0, "error loading config.json");
749 
750       def = container->container_def;
751     }
752 
753   if (def->hooks && def->hooks->poststop_len)
754     {
755       int ret;
756 
757       ret = do_hooks (def, 0, id, true, def->root->path, status->bundle,
758                       "stopped", (struct hook_s **) def->hooks->poststop,
759                       def->hooks->poststop_len, err);
760       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
761         crun_error_write_warning_and_release (context->output_handler_arg, &err);
762     }
763   if (container && container->container_def)
764     free_oci_container (container->container_def);
765   return 0;
766 }

768 static int
769 container_delete_internal (libcrun_context_t *context, oci_container *def, const char *id, bool force, bool only_cleanup, libcrun_error_t *err)
770 {
771   int ret;
772   cleanup_container_status libcrun_container_status_t status;
773   const char *state_root = context->state_root;
774 
775   memset (&status, 0, sizeof (status));
776   ret = libcrun_read_container_status (&status, state_root, id, err);
777   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
778     {
779       if (force && crun_error_get_errno (err) == ENOENT)
780         {
781           libcrun_error_t tmp_err = NULL;
782 
783           crun_error_release (err);
784           libcrun_container_delete_status (state_root, id, &tmp_err);
785           crun_error_release (&tmp_err);
786           return 0;
787         }
788       goto delete;
789     }
790 
791   if (!only_cleanup && !status.detached)
792     {
793       if (force)
794         {
795           ret = kill (status.pid, SIGKILL);
796           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0) && errno != ESRCH)
797             {
798               crun_make_error (err, errno, "kill");
799               return ret;
800             }
801         }
802       else
803         {
804           ret = libcrun_is_container_running (&status, err);
805           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
806             return ret;
807           if (ret == 1)
808             return crun_make_error (err, 0, "the container '%s' is not in 'stopped' state", id);
809         }
810     }
811 
812   if (status.cgroup_path)
813     {
814       ret = libcrun_cgroup_destroy (id, status.cgroup_path, status.systemd_cgroup, err);
815       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
816         crun_error_write_warning_and_release (context->output_handler_arg, &err);
817     }
818 
819   ret = run_poststop_hooks (context, def, &status, state_root, id, err);
820   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
821     crun_error_write_warning_and_release (context->output_handler_arg, &err);
822 
823  delete:
824   ret = libcrun_container_delete_status (state_root, id, err);
825 
826   return ret;
827 }
828 
829 int
830 libcrun_container_delete (libcrun_context_t *context, oci_container *def, const char *id, bool force, libcrun_error_t *err)
831 {
832   return container_delete_internal (context, def, id, force, false, err);
833 }

871 static int
872 reap_subprocesses (pid_t main_process, int *main_process_exit, int *last_process, libcrun_error_t *err)
873 {
874   *last_process = 0;
875   while (1)
876     {
877       int status;
878       int r = waitpid (-1, &status, WNOHANG);
879       if (r < 0)
880         {
881           if (errno == EINTR)
882             continue;
883           if (errno == ECHILD)
884             {
885               *last_process = 1;
886               return 0;
887             }
888           return crun_make_error (err, errno, "waitpid");
889         }
890       if (r == 0)
891         break;
892       if (r != main_process)
893         continue;
894 
895       if (WIFSIGNALED (status))
896         *main_process_exit = 128 + WTERMSIG (status);
897       if (WIFEXITED (status))
898         *main_process_exit = WEXITSTATUS (status);
899     }
900   return 0;
901 }

903 static int
904 handle_notify_socket (int notify_socketfd, libcrun_error_t *err)
905 {
906 #ifdef HAVE_SYSTEMD
907   int ret;
908   char buf[256];
909   const char *ready_str = "READY=1";
910 
911   ret = recvfrom (notify_socketfd, buf, sizeof (buf) - 1, 0, NULL, NULL);
912   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
913     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "recvfrom notify socket");
914 
915   buf[ret] = '\0';
916   if (strstr (buf, ready_str))
917     {
918       ret = sd_notify (0, ready_str);
919       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
920         return crun_make_error (err, errno, "sd_notify");
921 
922       return 1;
923     }
924   return 0;
925 #else
926   return 1;
927 #endif
928 }
929 
930 static int
931 wait_for_process (pid_t pid, libcrun_context_t *context, int terminal_fd, int notify_socket, int container_ready_fd, libcrun_error_t *err)
932 {
933   cleanup_close int epollfd = -1;
934   cleanup_close int signalfd = -1;
935   int ret, container_exit_code = 0, last_process;
936   sigset_t mask;
937   int fds[10];
938   int levelfds[10];
939   int levelfds_len = 0;
940   int fds_len = 0;
941 
942   container_exit_code = 0;
943 
944   if (context->pid_file)
945     {
946       char buf[12];
947       size_t buf_len = sprintf (buf, "%d", pid);
948       ret = write_file (context->pid_file, buf, buf_len, err);
949       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
950         return ret;
951     }
952 
953   /* Also exit if there is nothing more to wait for.  */
954   if (context->detach && notify_socket < 0)
955     return 0;
956 
957   if (container_ready_fd >= 0)
958     {
959       ret = 0;
960       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (container_ready_fd, &ret, sizeof (ret)));
961       close_and_reset (&container_ready_fd);
962     }
963 
964   sigfillset (&mask);
965   ret = sigprocmask (SIG_BLOCK, &mask, NULL);
966   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
967     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "sigprocmask");
968 
969   signalfd = create_signalfd (&mask, err);
970   if (UNLIKELY (signalfd < 0))
971     return signalfd;
972 
973   ret = reap_subprocesses (pid, &container_exit_code, &last_process, err);
974   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
975     return ret;
976 
977   if (last_process)
978     return container_exit_code;
979 
980   fds[fds_len++] = signalfd;
981   if (notify_socket >= 0)
982     fds[fds_len++] = notify_socket;
983   if (terminal_fd >= 0)
984     {
985       fds[fds_len++] = 0;
986       levelfds[levelfds_len++] = terminal_fd;
987     }
988   fds[fds_len++] = -1;
989   levelfds[levelfds_len++] = -1;
990 
991   epollfd = epoll_helper (fds, levelfds, err);
992   if (UNLIKELY (epollfd < 0))
993     return epollfd;
994 
995   while (1)
996     {
997       struct signalfd_siginfo si;
998       ssize_t res;
999       struct epoll_event events[10];
1000       int i, nr_events;
1001 
1002       nr_events = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (epoll_wait (epollfd, events, 10, -1));
1003       if (UNLIKELY (nr_events < 0))
1004         return crun_make_error (err, errno, "epoll_wait");
1005 
1006       for (i = 0; i < nr_events; i++)
1007         {
1008           if (events[i].data.fd == 0)
1009             {
1010               ret = copy_from_fd_to_fd (0, terminal_fd, 0, err);
1011               if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1012                 return ret;
1013             }
1014           else if (events[i].data.fd == terminal_fd)
1015             {
1016               ret = set_blocking_fd (terminal_fd, 0, err);
1017               if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1018                 return ret;
1019 
1020               ret = copy_from_fd_to_fd (terminal_fd, 1, 1, err);
1021               if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1022                 return ret;
1023 
1024               ret = set_blocking_fd (terminal_fd, 1, err);
1025               if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1026                 return ret;
1027             }
1028           else if (events[i].data.fd == notify_socket)
1029             {
1030               ret = handle_notify_socket (notify_socket, err);
1031               if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1032                 return ret;
1033               if (ret && context->detach)
1034                     return 0;
1035             }
1036           else if (events[i].data.fd == signalfd)
1037             {
1038               res = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (signalfd, &si, sizeof (si)));
1039               if (UNLIKELY (res < 0))
1040                 return crun_make_error (err, errno, "read from signalfd");
1041               if (si.ssi_signo == SIGCHLD)
1042                 {
1043                   ret = reap_subprocesses (pid, &container_exit_code, &last_process, err);
1044                   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1045                     return ret;
1046                   if (last_process)
1047                     return container_exit_code;
1048                 }
1049               else
1050                 {
1051                   /* Send any other signal to the child process.  */
1052                   ret = kill (pid, si.ssi_signo);
1053                 }
1054             }
1055           else
1056             {
1057               return crun_make_error (err, 0, "unknown fd from epoll_wait");
1058             }
1059         }
1060     }
1061 
1062   return 0;
1063 }
1064 
1065 static void
1066 flush_fd_to_err (libcrun_context_t *context, int terminal_fd)
1067 {
1068   char buf[256];
1069   int flags;
1070   if (terminal_fd < 0 || stderr == NULL)
1071     return;
1072 
1073   flags = fcntl (terminal_fd, F_GETFL, 0);
1074   if (flags == -1)
1075     return;
1076   if (fcntl (terminal_fd, F_SETFL, flags | O_NONBLOCK) < 0)
1077     return;
1078 
1079   for (;;)
1080     {
1081       int ret = read (terminal_fd, buf, sizeof (buf) - 1);
1082       if (ret <= 0)
1083         break;
1084       buf[ret] = '\0';
1085       if (context->output_handler)
1086         context->output_handler (0, buf, false, context->output_handler_arg);
1087     }
1088   (void) fcntl (terminal_fd, F_SETFL, flags);
1089   fflush (stderr);
1090   fsync (1);
1091   fsync (2);
1092 }
1093 
1094 static void
1095 cleanup_watch (libcrun_context_t *context, pid_t init_pid, oci_container *def, const char *id, int sync_socket, int terminal_fd)
1096 {
1097   libcrun_error_t err = NULL;
1098   container_delete_internal (context, def, id, 1, true, &err);
1099   crun_error_release (&err);
1100 
1101   if (init_pid)
1102     kill (init_pid, SIGKILL);
1103 
1104   sync_socket_wait_sync (context, sync_socket, true, &err);
1105   if (err)
1106     {
1107       if (context->output_handler)
1108         context->output_handler (err->status, err->msg, false, context->output_handler_arg);
1109       crun_error_release (&err);
1110     }
1111 
1112   if (terminal_fd >= 0)
1113     flush_fd_to_err (context, terminal_fd);
1114 }

1152 static int
1153 libcrun_container_run_internal (libcrun_container_t *container, libcrun_context_t *context, int container_ready_fd, libcrun_error_t *err)
1154 {
1155   oci_container *def = container->container_def;
1156   int ret;
1157   pid_t pid;
1158   int detach = context->detach;
1159   cleanup_free char *cgroup_path = NULL;
1160   cleanup_close int terminal_fd = -1;
1161   cleanup_terminal void *orig_terminal = NULL;
1162   cleanup_close int sync_socket = -1;
1163   cleanup_close int notify_socket = -1;
1164   cleanup_close int socket_pair_0 = -1;
1165   cleanup_close int socket_pair_1 = -1;
1166   cleanup_close int seccomp_fd = -1;
1167   cleanup_close int console_socket_fd = -1;
1168   int cgroup_mode, cgroup_manager;
1169   char created[35];
1170   struct container_entrypoint_s container_args =
1171     {
1172       .container = container,
1173       .context = context,
1174       .terminal_socketpair = {-1, -1},
1175       .console_socket_fd = -1
1176     };
1177 
1178   container->context = context;
1179 
1180   if (!detach)
1181     {
1182       ret = prctl (PR_SET_CHILD_SUBREAPER, 1, 0, 0, 0);
1183       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1184         return crun_make_error (err, errno, "set child subreaper");
1185     }
1186 
1187   if (!context->no_new_keyring)
1188     {
1189       ret = libcrun_create_keyring (container->context->id, err);
1190       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1191         return ret;
1192     }
1193 
1194   if (def->process && def->process->terminal && !detach && context->console_socket == NULL)
1195     {
1196       container_args.has_terminal_socket_pair = 1;
1197       ret = create_socket_pair (container_args.terminal_socketpair, err);
1198       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1199         return ret;
1200       socket_pair_0 = container_args.terminal_socketpair[0];
1201       socket_pair_1 = container_args.terminal_socketpair[1];
1202     }
1203 
1204   ret = block_signals (err);
1205   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1206     return ret;
1207 
1208   if (def->linux && def->linux->seccomp)
1209     {
1210       ret = open_seccomp_output (context->id, &seccomp_fd, false, context->state_root, err);
1211       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1212         return ret;
1213     }
1214   container_args.seccomp_fd = seccomp_fd;
1215 
1216   if (context->console_socket)
1217     {
1218       console_socket_fd = open_unix_domain_client_socket (context->console_socket, 0, err);
1219       if (UNLIKELY (console_socket_fd < 0))
1220         return ret;
1221       container_args.console_socket_fd = console_socket_fd;
1222     }
1223 
1224   pid = libcrun_run_linux_container (container, context->detach,
1225                                      container_entrypoint, &container_args,
1226                                      &sync_socket, err);
1227   if (UNLIKELY (pid < 0))
1228     return pid;
1229 
1230   if (context->fifo_exec_wait_fd < 0 && context->notify_socket)
1231     {
1232       /* Do not open the notify socket here on "create".  "start" will take care of it.  */
1233       ret = get_notify_fd (context, container, &notify_socket, err);
1234       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1235         return ret;
1236     }
1237 
1238   if (seccomp_fd >= 0)
1239     close_and_reset (&seccomp_fd);
1240 
1241   if (container_args.terminal_socketpair[1] >= 0)
1242     close_and_reset (&socket_pair_1);
1243 
1244   cgroup_mode = libcrun_get_cgroup_mode (err);
1245   if (cgroup_mode < 0)
1246     return cgroup_mode;
1247 
1248   cgroup_manager = CGROUP_MANAGER_CGROUPFS;
1249   if (context->systemd_cgroup)
1250     cgroup_manager = CGROUP_MANAGER_SYSTEMD;
1251   else if (context->force_no_cgroup)
1252     cgroup_manager = CGROUP_MANAGER_DISABLED;
1253 
1254   ret = libcrun_cgroup_enter (def->linux ? def->linux->resources : NULL, cgroup_mode, &cgroup_path, def->linux ? def->linux->cgroups_path : "", cgroup_manager, pid, context->id, err);
1255   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1256     {
1257       cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1258       return ret;
1259     }
1260 
1261   if (def->linux && def->linux->resources)
1262     {
1263       ret = libcrun_update_cgroup_resources (cgroup_mode, def->linux->resources, cgroup_path, err);
1264       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1265         {
1266           cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1267           return ret;
1268         }
1269     }
1270 
1271   ret = sync_socket_send_sync (sync_socket, true, err);
1272   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1273     {
1274       cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1275       return ret;
1276     }
1277 
1278   ret = sync_socket_wait_sync (context, sync_socket, false, err);
1279   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1280     {
1281       cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1282       return ret;
1283     }
1284 
1285   /* The container is waiting that we write back.  In this phase we can launch the
1286      prestart hooks.  */
1287   if (def->hooks && def->hooks->prestart_len)
1288     {
1289       ret = do_hooks (def, pid, context->id, false, def->root->path, NULL, "created",
1290                       (struct hook_s **) def->hooks->prestart,
1291                       def->hooks->prestart_len, err);
1292       if (UNLIKELY (ret != 0))
1293         {
1294           cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1295           return ret;
1296         }
1297     }
1298 
1299   ret = sync_socket_send_sync (sync_socket, true, err);
1300   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1301     {
1302       cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1303       return ret;
1304     }
1305 
1306   ret = sync_socket_wait_sync (context, sync_socket, false, err);
1307   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1308     {
1309       cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1310       return ret;
1311     }
1312 
1313   if (def->process && def->process->terminal && !detach && context->console_socket == NULL)
1314     {
1315       terminal_fd = receive_fd_from_socket (socket_pair_0, err);
1316       if (UNLIKELY (terminal_fd < 0))
1317         {
1318           cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1319           return terminal_fd;
1320         }
1321 
1322       close_and_reset (&socket_pair_0);
1323 
1324       ret = libcrun_setup_terminal_master (terminal_fd, &orig_terminal, err);
1325       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1326         {
1327           cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1328           return terminal_fd;
1329         }
1330     }
1331 
1332   ret = close_and_reset (&sync_socket);
1333   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1334     {
1335       cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1336       return ret;
1337     }
1338 
1339   get_current_timestamp (created);
1340   ret = write_container_status (container, context, pid, cgroup_path, created, err);
1341   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1342     {
1343       cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1344       return ret;
1345     }
1346 
1347   if (def->hooks && def->hooks->poststart_len)
1348     {
1349       ret = do_hooks (def, pid, context->id, true, def->root->path, NULL, "running",
1350                       (struct hook_s **) def->hooks->poststart,
1351                       def->hooks->poststart_len, err);
1352       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1353         {
1354           cleanup_watch (context, pid, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1355           return ret;
1356         }
1357     }
1358 
1359   ret = wait_for_process (pid, context, terminal_fd, notify_socket, container_ready_fd, err);
1360   if (!context->detach)
1361     cleanup_watch (context, 0, def, context->id, sync_socket, terminal_fd);
1362 
1363   return ret;
1364 }
1365 
1366 static
1367 int check_config_file (oci_container *def, libcrun_error_t *err)
1368 {
1369   if (UNLIKELY (def->root == NULL))
1370     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "invalid config file, no 'root' block specified");
1371   if (UNLIKELY (def->linux == NULL))
1372     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "invalid config file, no 'linux' block specified");
1373   if (UNLIKELY (def->mounts == NULL))
1374     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "invalid config file, no 'mounts' block specified");
1375   return 0;
1376 }
1377 
1378 static
1379 int libcrun_copy_config_file (const char *id, const char *state_root, const char *bundle, libcrun_error_t *err)
1380 {
1381   int ret;
1382   cleanup_free char *src_path = NULL;
1383   cleanup_free char *dest_path = NULL;
1384   cleanup_free char *dir = NULL;
1385   cleanup_free char *buffer = NULL;
1386   size_t len;
1387 
1388   dir = libcrun_get_state_directory (state_root, id);
1389   if (UNLIKELY (dir == NULL))
1390         return crun_make_error (err, 0, "cannot get state directory");
1391 
1392   xasprintf (&src_path, "%s/config.json", bundle);
1393   xasprintf (&dest_path, "%s/config.json", dir);
1394 
1395   ret = read_all_file (src_path, &buffer, &len, err);
1396   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1397     return ret;
1398 
1399   ret = write_file (dest_path, buffer, len, err);
1400   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1401     return ret;
1402 
1403   return 0;
1404 }
1405 
1406 int
1407 libcrun_container_run (libcrun_context_t *context, libcrun_container_t *container, unsigned int options, libcrun_error_t *err)
1408 {
1409   oci_container *def = container->container_def;
1410   int ret;
1411   int detach = context->detach;
1412   int container_ret_status[2];
1413   cleanup_close int pipefd0 = -1;
1414   cleanup_close int pipefd1 = -1;
1415 
1416   container->context = context;
1417 
1418   ret = check_config_file (def, err);
1419   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1420     return ret;
1421 
1422   if (def->oci_version && strstr (def->oci_version, "1.0") == NULL)
1423     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "unknown version specified");
1424 
1425   ret = libcrun_status_check_directories (context->state_root, context->id, err);
1426   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1427     return ret;
1428 
1429   ret = libcrun_copy_config_file (context->id, context->state_root, context->bundle, err);
1430   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1431     return ret;
1432 
1433   if (def->process && def->process->terminal && detach && context->console_socket == NULL)
1434     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "use --console-socket with --detach when a terminal is used");
1435 
1436   if (!detach && (options & LIBCRUN_RUN_OPTIONS_PREFORK) == 0)
1437     return libcrun_container_run_internal (container, context, -1, err);
1438 
1439   ret = pipe (container_ret_status);
1440   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1441     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "pipe");
1442   pipefd0 = container_ret_status[0];
1443   pipefd1 = container_ret_status[1];
1444 
1445   ret = fork ();
1446   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1447     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "fork");
1448   if (ret)
1449     {
1450       int status;
1451       close_and_reset (&pipefd1);
1452       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (waitpid (ret, &status, 0));
1453 
1454       ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (pipefd0, &status, sizeof (status)));
1455       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1456         return ret;
1457 
1458       if (status < 0)
1459         {
1460           int errno_;
1461           char buf[512];
1462           ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (pipefd0, &errno_, sizeof (errno_)));
1463           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1464             return ret;
1465 
1466           ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (pipefd0, buf, sizeof (buf) - 1));
1467           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1468             return ret;
1469           buf[ret] = '\0';
1470 
1471           return crun_make_error (err, errno_, buf);
1472         }
1473 
1474       return status;
1475     }
1476 
1477   close_and_reset (&pipefd0);
1478 
1479   /* forked process.  */
1480   ret = detach_process ();
1481   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1482     libcrun_fail_with_error (errno, "detach process");
1483   ret = libcrun_container_run_internal (container, context, -1, err);
1484   TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (pipefd1, &ret, sizeof (ret)));
1485   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1486     {
1487       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (pipefd1, &((*err)->status), sizeof ((*err)->status)));
1488       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (pipefd1, (*err)->msg, strlen ((*err)->msg) + 1));
1489 
1490       crun_set_output_handler (log_write_to_stderr, NULL);
1491       libcrun_fail_with_error ((*err)->status, "%s", (*err)->msg);
1492     }
1493   exit (ret);
1494 }
1495 
1496 int
1497 libcrun_container_create (libcrun_context_t *context, libcrun_container_t *container, libcrun_error_t *err)
1498 {
1499   oci_container *def = container->container_def;
1500   int ret;
1501   int container_ready_pipe[2];
1502   cleanup_close int pipefd0 = -1;
1503   cleanup_close int pipefd1 = -1;
1504   cleanup_close int exec_fifo_fd = -1;
1505   context->detach = 1;
1506 
1507   container->context = context;
1508 
1509   if (def->oci_version && strstr (def->oci_version, "1.0") == NULL)
1510     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "unknown version specified");
1511 
1512   ret = check_config_file (def, err);
1513   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1514     return ret;
1515 
1516   ret = libcrun_status_check_directories (context->state_root, context->id, err);
1517   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1518     return ret;
1519 
1520   ret = libcrun_copy_config_file (context->id, context->state_root, ".", err);
1521   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1522     return ret;
1523 
1524   if (def->process && def->process->terminal && context->console_socket == NULL)
1525     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "use --console-socket with create when a terminal is used");
1526 
1527   exec_fifo_fd = libcrun_status_create_exec_fifo (context->state_root, context->id, err);
1528   if (UNLIKELY (exec_fifo_fd < 0))
1529     return exec_fifo_fd;
1530 
1531   ret = pipe (container_ready_pipe);
1532   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1533     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "pipe");
1534   pipefd0 = container_ready_pipe[0];
1535   pipefd1 = container_ready_pipe[1];
1536 
1537   ret = fork ();
1538   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1539     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "fork");
1540   if (ret)
1541     {
1542       int exit_code;
1543       close_and_reset (&pipefd1);
1544 
1545       TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (waitpid (ret, NULL, 0));
1546 
1547       ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (pipefd0, &exit_code, sizeof (exit_code)));
1548       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1549         return crun_make_error (err, errno, "waiting for container to be ready");
1550       if (ret > 0)
1551         {
1552           if (exit_code != 0)
1553             {
1554               libcrun_error_t tmp_err;
1555               libcrun_container_delete (context, def, context->id, true, &tmp_err);
1556               crun_error_release (err);
1557             }
1558           return -exit_code;
1559         }
1560       return 1;
1561     }
1562 
1563   context->fifo_exec_wait_fd = exec_fifo_fd;
1564   exec_fifo_fd = -1;
1565 
1566   /* forked process.  */
1567   ret = detach_process ();
1568   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1569     libcrun_fail_with_error (errno, "detach process");
1570 
1571   ret = libcrun_container_run_internal (container, context, pipefd1, err);
1572   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1573     {
1574       libcrun_error ((*err)->status, true, "%s", (*err)->msg);
1575       crun_set_output_handler (log_write_to_stderr, NULL);
1576     }
1577 
1578   TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (pipefd1, &ret, sizeof (ret)));
1579   exit (ret);
1580 }
1581 
1582 int
1583 libcrun_container_start (libcrun_context_t *context, const char *id, libcrun_error_t *err)
1584 {
1585   int ret;
1586   cleanup_close int fd = -1;
1587   const char *state_root = context->state_root;
1588   libcrun_container_status_t status;
1589 
1590   memset (&status, 0, sizeof (status));
1591   ret = libcrun_read_container_status (&status, state_root, id, err);
1592   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1593     return ret;
1594 
1595   ret = libcrun_is_container_running (&status, err);
1596   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1597     return ret;
1598 
1599   if (!ret)
1600     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "container '%s' is not running", id);
1601 
1602   if (context->notify_socket)
1603     {
1604       ret = get_notify_fd (context, NULL, &fd, err);
1605       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1606         return ret;
1607     }
1608 
1609   ret = libcrun_status_write_exec_fifo (context->state_root, id, err);
1610   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1611     return ret;
1612 
1613   if (context->notify_socket)
1614     {
1615       if (fd >= 0)
1616         {
1617           fd_set read_set;
1618 
1619           while (1)
1620             {
1621               struct timeval timeout = {
1622                                         .tv_sec = 0,
1623                                         .tv_usec = 10000,
1624               };
1625               FD_ZERO (&read_set);
1626               FD_SET (fd, &read_set);
1627 
1628               ret = select (fd + 1, &read_set, NULL, NULL, &timeout);
1629               if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1630                 return ret;
1631               if (ret)
1632                 {
1633                   ret = handle_notify_socket (fd, err);
1634                   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1635                     return ret;
1636                   if (ret)
1637                     break;
1638                 }
1639               else
1640                 {
1641                   ret = libcrun_is_container_running (&status, err);
1642                   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1643                     return ret;
1644                   if (!ret)
1645                     return 0;
1646                 }
1647             }
1648         }
1649     }
1650 
1651   return 0;
1652 }
1653 
1654 int
1655 libcrun_get_container_state_string (const char *id, libcrun_container_status_t *status, const char *state_root, const char **container_status, int *running, libcrun_error_t *err)
1656 {
1657   int ret, has_fifo = 0;
1658 
1659   ret = libcrun_is_container_running (status, err);
1660   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1661     return ret;
1662   *running = ret;
1663 
1664   if (*running)
1665     {
1666       ret = libcrun_status_has_read_exec_fifo (state_root, id, err);
1667       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1668         return ret;
1669       has_fifo = ret;
1670     }
1671 
1672   if (! *running)
1673     *container_status = "stopped";
1674   else if (has_fifo)
1675     *container_status = "created";
1676   else
1677     *container_status = "running";
1678 
1679   return 0;
1680 }
1681 
1682 int
1683 libcrun_container_state (libcrun_context_t *context, const char *id, FILE *out, libcrun_error_t *err)
1684 {
1685   libcrun_container_status_t status;
1686   const char *state_root = context->state_root;
1687   const char *container_status = NULL;
1688   yajl_gen gen = NULL;
1689   const unsigned char *buf;
1690   int ret = 0;
1691   int running;
1692   size_t len;
1693 
1694   memset (&status, 0, sizeof (status));
1695   ret = libcrun_read_container_status (&status, state_root, id, err);
1696   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1697     return ret;
1698 
1699   ret = libcrun_get_container_state_string (id, &status, state_root, &container_status, &running, err);
1700   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1701     goto exit;
1702 
1703   ret = 0;
1704   gen = yajl_gen_alloc (NULL);
1705   if (gen == NULL)
1706     return crun_make_error (err, 0, "yajl_gen_alloc failed");
1707 
1708   yajl_gen_config (gen, yajl_gen_beautify, 1);
1709   yajl_gen_config (gen, yajl_gen_validate_utf8, 1);
1710 
1711   yajl_gen_map_open (gen);
1712   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("ociVersion"), strlen ("ociVersion"));
1713   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("1.0.0"), strlen ("1.0.0"));
1714 
1715   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("id"), strlen ("id"));
1716   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (id), strlen (id));
1717 
1718   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("pid"), strlen ("pid"));
1719   yajl_gen_integer (gen, running ? status.pid : 0);
1720 
1721   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("status"), strlen ("status"));
1722   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (container_status), strlen (container_status));
1723 
1724   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("bundle"), strlen ("bundle"));
1725   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (status.bundle), strlen (status.bundle));
1726 
1727   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("rootfs"), strlen ("rootfs"));
1728   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (status.rootfs), strlen (status.rootfs));
1729 
1730   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("created"), strlen ("created"));
1731   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (status.created), strlen (status.created));
1732 
1733   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("owner"), strlen ("owner"));
1734   yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (""), strlen (""));
1735 
1736   {
1737     size_t i;
1738     cleanup_free char *config_file;
1739     cleanup_free libcrun_container_t *container = NULL;
1740     cleanup_free char *dir = NULL;
1741 
1742     dir = libcrun_get_state_directory (state_root, id);
1743     if (UNLIKELY (dir == NULL))
1744       return crun_make_error (err, 0, "cannot get state directory");
1745 
1746     xasprintf (&config_file, "%s/config.json", dir);
1747     container = libcrun_container_load_from_file (config_file, err);
1748     if (UNLIKELY (container == NULL))
1749       return crun_make_error (err, 0, "error loading config.json");
1750 
1751     if (container->container_def->annotations && container->container_def->annotations->len)
1752       {
1753         yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR ("annotations"), strlen ("annotations"));
1754         yajl_gen_map_open (gen);
1755         for (i = 0; i < container->container_def->annotations->len; i++)
1756           {
1757             const char *key = container->container_def->annotations->keys[i];
1758             const char *val = container->container_def->annotations->values[i];
1759             yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (key), strlen (key));
1760             yajl_gen_string (gen, YAJL_STR (val), strlen (val));
1761           }
1762         yajl_gen_map_close (gen);
1763       }
1764    free_oci_container (container->container_def);
1765   }
1766 
1767   yajl_gen_map_close (gen);
1768 
1769   yajl_gen_get_buf (gen, &buf, &len);
1770 
1771   fprintf (out, "%s\n", buf);
1772 
1773  exit:
1774   if (gen)
1775     yajl_gen_free (gen);
1776   libcrun_free_container_status (&status);
1777   return ret;
1778 }
1779 
1780 int
1781 libcrun_container_exec (libcrun_context_t *context, const char *id, oci_container_process *process, libcrun_error_t *err)
1782 {
1783   int ret;
1784   pid_t pid;
1785   libcrun_container_status_t status;
1786   const char *state_root = context->state_root;
1787   cleanup_close int terminal_fd = -1;
1788   cleanup_close int seccomp_fd = -1;
1789   cleanup_terminal void *orig_terminal = NULL;
1790   cleanup_free char *config_file = NULL;
1791   cleanup_free libcrun_container_t *container = NULL;
1792   cleanup_free char *dir = NULL;
1793 
1794   memset (&status, 0, sizeof (status));
1795   ret = libcrun_read_container_status (&status, state_root, id, err);
1796   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1797     return ret;
1798 
1799   ret = libcrun_is_container_running (&status, err);
1800   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
1801     return ret;
1802

259 #define SYNC_SOCKET_MESSAGE_LEN(x, l) (offsetof (struct sync_socket_message_s, message) + l)
260 
261 static int
262 sync_socket_write_msg (int fd, bool warning, int err_value, const char *log_msg)
263 {
264   int ret;
265   size_t err_len;
266   struct sync_socket_message_s msg;
267   msg.type = warning ? SYNC_SOCKET_WARNING_MESSAGE : SYNC_SOCKET_ERROR_MESSAGE;
268   msg.error_value = err_value;
269 
270   if (fd < 0)
271     return 0;
272 
273   err_len = strlen (log_msg);
274   if (err_len >= sizeof (msg.message))
275     err_len = sizeof (msg.message) - 1;
276 
277   memcpy (msg.message, log_msg, err_len);
278   msg.message[err_len] = '\0';
279 
280   ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (fd, &msg, SYNC_SOCKET_MESSAGE_LEN (msg, err_len + 1)));
281   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
282     return -1;
283 
284   return 0;
285 }
286 
287 static int
288 sync_socket_write_error (int fd, libcrun_error_t *out_err)
289 {
290   if (fd < 0)
291     return 0;
292   return sync_socket_write_msg (fd, false, (*out_err)->status, (*out_err)->msg);
293 }
294 
295 static void
296 log_write_to_sync_socket (int errno_, const char *msg, bool warning, void *arg)
297 {
298   struct container_entrypoint_s *entrypoint_args = arg;
299   int fd = entrypoint_args->sync_socket;
300 
301   if (fd < 0)
302     return;
303 
304   if (sync_socket_write_msg (fd, warning, errno_, msg) < 0)
305     log_write_to_stderr (errno_, msg, warning, arg);
306 }
307 
308 static int
309 sync_socket_wait_sync (libcrun_context_t *context, int fd, bool flush, libcrun_error_t *err)
310 {
311   struct sync_socket_message_s msg;
312 
313   if (fd < 0)
314     return 0;
315 
316   while (true)
317     {
318       int ret;
319 
320       ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (fd, &msg, sizeof (msg)));
321       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
322         {
323           if (flush)
324             return 0;
325           return crun_make_error (err, errno, "read from sync socket");
326         }
327 
328       if (ret == 0)
329         {
330           if (flush)
331             return 0;
332           return crun_make_error (err, 0, "sync socket closed");
333         }
334 
335       if (!flush && msg.type == SYNC_SOCKET_SYNC_MESSAGE)
336         return 0;
337 
338       if (msg.type == SYNC_SOCKET_WARNING_MESSAGE)
339         {
340           if (context)
341             context->output_handler (msg.error_value, msg.message, 1, context->output_handler_arg);
342           continue;
343         }
344       if (msg.type == SYNC_SOCKET_ERROR_MESSAGE)
345         return crun_make_error (err, msg.error_value, "%s", msg.message);
346     }
347 }
348 
349 static int
350 sync_socket_send_sync (int fd, bool flush_errors, libcrun_error_t *err)
351 {
352   int ret;
353   struct sync_socket_message_s msg = {0, };
354   msg.type = SYNC_SOCKET_SYNC_MESSAGE;
355 
356   if (fd < 0)
357     return 0;
358 
359   ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (write (fd, &msg, SYNC_SOCKET_MESSAGE_LEN (msg, 0)));
360   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
361     {
362       if (flush_errors)
363         {
364           ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (fd, &msg, sizeof (msg)));
365           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
366             goto original_error;
367           if (msg.type == SYNC_SOCKET_ERROR_MESSAGE)
368             return crun_make_error (err, msg.error_value, "%s", msg.message);
369         }
370     original_error:
371       return crun_make_error (err, errno, "write to sync socket");
372     }
373 
374   return 0;
375 }

418 static
419 int block_signals (libcrun_error_t *err)
420 {
421   int ret;
422   sigset_t mask;
423   sigfillset (&mask);
424   ret = sigprocmask (SIG_BLOCK, &mask, NULL);
425   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
426     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "sigprocmask");
427   return 0;
428 }
429 
430 static
431 int unblock_signals (libcrun_error_t *err)
432 {
433   int ret;
434   sigset_t mask;
435   sigfillset (&mask);
436   ret = sigprocmask (SIG_UNBLOCK, &mask, NULL);
437   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
438     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "sigprocmask");
439   return 0;
440 }

442 static int
443 container_entrypoint_init (void *args, const char *notify_socket,
444                            int sync_socket, libcrun_error_t *err)
445 {
446   struct container_entrypoint_s *entrypoint_args = args;
447   libcrun_container_t *container = entrypoint_args->container;
448   int ret;
449   int has_terminal;
450   cleanup_close int console_socket = -1;
451   cleanup_close int console_socketpair = -1;
452   oci_container *def = container->container_def;
453   oci_container_process_capabilities *capabilities;
454   cleanup_free char *rootfs = NULL;
455   int no_new_privs;
456 
457   rootfs = realpath (def->root->path, NULL);
458   if (UNLIKELY (rootfs == NULL))
459     {
460       /* If realpath failed for any reason, try the relative directory.  */
461       rootfs = xstrdup (def->root->path);
462     }
463 
464   if (entrypoint_args->terminal_socketpair[0] >= 0)
465     {
466       close_and_reset (&entrypoint_args->terminal_socketpair[0]);
467       console_socketpair = entrypoint_args->terminal_socketpair[1];
468     }
469 
470   ret = sync_socket_wait_sync (NULL, sync_socket, false, err);
471   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
472     return ret;
473 
474   has_terminal = container->container_def->process && container->container_def->process->terminal;
475   if (has_terminal && entrypoint_args->context->console_socket)
476     console_socket = entrypoint_args->console_socket_fd;
477 
478   ret = libcrun_set_sysctl (container, err);
479   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
480     return ret;
481 
482   ret = libcrun_set_mounts (container, rootfs, err);
483   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
484     return ret;
485 
486   ret = libcrun_container_enter_cgroup_ns (container, err);
487   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
488     return ret;
489 
490   ret = sync_socket_send_sync (sync_socket, false, err);
491   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
492     return ret;
493 
494   ret = sync_socket_wait_sync (NULL, sync_socket, false, err);
495   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
496     return ret;
497 
498   ret = libcrun_do_pivot_root (container, entrypoint_args->context->no_pivot, rootfs, err);
499   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
500     return ret;
501 
502   if (has_terminal)
503     {
504       cleanup_close int terminal_fd = -1;
505 
506       ret = setsid ();
507       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
508         return crun_make_error (err, errno, "setsid");
509 
510       fflush (stderr);
511 
512       terminal_fd = libcrun_set_terminal (container, err);
513       if (UNLIKELY (terminal_fd < 0))
514         return terminal_fd;
515 
516       if (console_socket >= 0)
517         {
518           ret = send_fd_to_socket (console_socket, terminal_fd, err);
519           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
520             return ret;
521           close_and_reset (&console_socket);
522         }
523       else if (entrypoint_args->has_terminal_socket_pair && console_socketpair >= 0)
524         {
525           ret = send_fd_to_socket (console_socketpair, terminal_fd, err);
526           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
527             return ret;
528 
529           close_and_reset (&console_socketpair);
530         }
531     }
532 
533   ret = libcrun_set_selinux_exec_label (container, err);
534   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
535     return ret;
536 
537   ret = libcrun_set_hostname (container, err);
538   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
539     return ret;
540 
541   if (def->process && !def->process->no_new_privileges)
542     {
543       ret = libcrun_generate_and_load_seccomp (entrypoint_args->container, entrypoint_args->seccomp_fd, err);
544       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
545         return ret;
546     }
547 
548   capabilities = def->process ? def->process->capabilities : NULL;
549   no_new_privs = def->process ? def->process->no_new_privileges : 1;
550   ret = libcrun_set_caps (capabilities, container->container_uid, container->container_gid, no_new_privs, err);
551   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
552     return ret;
553 
554   if (def->process && def->process->cwd)
555     if (UNLIKELY (chdir (def->process->cwd) < 0))
556       return crun_make_error (err, errno, "chdir");
557 
558   if (clearenv ())
559     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "clearenv");
560 
561   if (def->process)
562     {
563       size_t i;
564 
565       for (i = 0; i < def->process->env_len; i++)
566         if (putenv (def->process->env[i]) < 0)
567           return crun_make_error (err, errno, "putenv '%s'", def->process->env[i]);
568     }
569   if (notify_socket)
570     {
571       char *notify_socket_env;
572       xasprintf (&notify_socket_env, "NOTIFY_SOCKET=%s", notify_socket);
573       if (putenv (notify_socket_env) < 0)
574         return crun_make_error (err, errno, "putenv '%s'", notify_socket_env);
575     }
576 
577   return 0;
578 }
579 
580 /* Entrypoint to the container.  */
581 static int
582 container_entrypoint (void *args, const char *notify_socket,
583                       int sync_socket, libcrun_error_t *err)
584 {
585   struct container_entrypoint_s *entrypoint_args = args;
586   int ret;
587   oci_container *def = entrypoint_args->container->container_def;
588   entrypoint_args->sync_socket = sync_socket;
589 
590   crun_set_output_handler (log_write_to_sync_socket, args);
591 
592   ret = container_entrypoint_init (args, notify_socket, sync_socket, err);
593   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
594     {
595       /* If it fails to write the error using the sync socket, then fallback
596          to stderr.  */
597       if (sync_socket_write_error (sync_socket, err) < 0)
598         return ret;
599 
600       crun_error_release (err);
601       return ret;
602     }
603 
604   entrypoint_args->sync_socket = -1;
605 
606   ret = unblock_signals (err);
607   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
608     return ret;
609 
610   ret = sync_socket_send_sync (sync_socket, false, err);
611   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
612     return ret;
613 
614   if (entrypoint_args->context->fifo_exec_wait_fd >= 0)
615     {
616       char buffer[1];
617       fd_set read_set;
618       cleanup_close int fd = entrypoint_args->context->fifo_exec_wait_fd;
619       entrypoint_args->context->fifo_exec_wait_fd = -1;
620 
621       FD_ZERO (&read_set);
622       FD_SET (fd, &read_set);
623       do
624         {
625           ret = select (fd + 1, &read_set, NULL, NULL, NULL);
626           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
627             return crun_make_error (err, errno, "select");
628 
629           ret = TEMP_FAILURE_RETRY (read (fd, buffer, sizeof (buffer)));
630           if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
631             return crun_make_error (err, errno, "read from the exec fifo");
632         }
633       while (ret == 0);
634     }
635 
636   crun_set_output_handler (log_write_to_stream, stderr);
637 
638   ret = close_fds_ge_than (entrypoint_args->context->preserve_fds + 3, err);
639   if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
640     crun_error_write_warning_and_release (entrypoint_args->context->output_handler_arg, &err);
641 
642   if (def->process && def->process->no_new_privileges)
643     {
644       ret = libcrun_generate_and_load_seccomp (entrypoint_args->container, entrypoint_args->seccomp_fd, err);
645       if (UNLIKELY (ret < 0))
646         return ret;
647     }
648 
649   if (! def->process)
650     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "block 'process' not found");
651 
652   execvp (def->process->args[0], def->process->args);
653   if (errno == ENOENT)
654     return crun_make_error (err, errno, "executable file not found in $PATH");
655 
656   return crun_make_error (err, errno, "exec the container process");
657 }
